basic_details.short_information: Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICMR under Advertisement No. ICMR/Rectt/CRMCH/01/2026-RPCell. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR Scientist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters from a recognized University in a subject related to Biomedical Sciences or Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI, MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC
qualification.details: Scientist-C (Non-Medical): Masters from a recognized University in a subject related to Biomedical Sciences Or Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI. Scientist-B (Medical): MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC. Scientist-B (Non-Medical): Masters from a recognised University in a subject related to Biomedical Sciences Or Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI.

salary_details.details: Scientist-C (Non-Medical): Level-11 (Rs. 67700-208700) Scientist-B (Medical): Level-10 (56,100-1,77,500) Scientist-B (Non-Medical): Level-10 (56,100-1,77,500)

selection_process: Computer based test (MCQs) or interview or both Shortlisting based on eligibility
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_council_of_medical_research_icmr: Masters from a recognized University in a subject related to Biomedical Sciences or Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI, MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC

content_sections.heading: ICMR Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICMR Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientist-C (Non-Medical): Masters from a recognized University in a subject related to Biomedical Sciences Or Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI. Scientist-B (Medical): MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC. Scientist-B (Non-Medical): Masters from a recognised University in a subject related to Biomedical Sciences Or Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI.

content_sections.heading: ICMR Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Scientist-C (Non-Medical): Level-11 (Rs. 67700-208700) Scientist-B (Medical): Level-10 (56,100-1,77,500) Scientist-B (Non-Medical): Level-10 (56,100-1,77,500)

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: ICMR Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Computer based test (MCQs) or interview or both Shortlisting based on eligibility

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the ICMR Scientist posts is 10-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Scientist post at ICMR?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Scientist post announced by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientist posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification includes a Masters degree in Biomedical Sciences or a Pharm-D degree for non-medical posts, and an MBBS degree for medical posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for ICMR Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1500/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited Scientists?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-10 or Level-11, with salaries ranging from Rs. 56,100-1,77,500 to Rs. 67,700-208,700 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for ICMR Scientist jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a computer-based test (MCQs), an interview, or both, after initial shortlisting based on eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from any state apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions the location as Chandrapur, Maharashtra. However, candidates from all eligible states can apply if they meet the criteria.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Specific details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories are not provided in the summary. Candidates should refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the ICMR Scientist positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official ICMR website or the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
